_curator_notes: NEVER manifest infra/k8s/*/kustomization.yaml (the CI-pinned 40-hex newTag trips the entropy secret-guard) or any file with CSP sha256-… hashes / base64 blobs. Paths must be git-tracked and must not start with a Construct station prefix or contain award/leadership/profile.

files.note: Root layout — app shell, nav, fonts (self-hosted IBM Plex Mono via next/font), theme + metadata wiring
The interactive terminal console on the home page — command parser, known commands, easter eggs
Cmd-K command palette — route navigation, theme switching, bespoke goto commands
Site navigation bar driven by the shared routes registry
Single source of truth for site routes — feeds the nav, command palette and sitemap
Project cards on /work with the inline expandable detail disclosure (aria-expanded + hidden panel)
/system live telemetry dashboard — polls the core service, renders metrics, uptime and the request trace
The Oracle chat client — SSE streaming, live agent trace panel, citation chips, Turnstile gating
Paste-a-job-description analyzer — maps JD requirements to evidenced experience via the ai service
/lab deck of safe-by-construction infra demos (chaos, load, rate-limit, events, api playground)
Cloudflare Turnstile wrapper — bot-gates the public AI endpoints
/meet book-a-call request form — CSP-safe mailto composition, no third-party scheduler
Decorative CSS stroke-draw 'gipc' signature mark — reduced-motion-safe SVG
Privacy-respecting geo greeter — country-only from the edge header, stores nothing
Hand-rolled motion utilities — the site uses no animation framework (ADR 0001)
/resume page — static crawlable résumé DOM + JSON-LD with the immersive Construct layered on top
The static selectable résumé DOM — server-rendered stations the Construct animates
Construct mode switch — static-first progressive enhancement, reduced-motion gate, ?station deep-link
Construct immersive layer — 2D-canvas glyph rain, device tiers T0-T3 with ?gpu override, hand-authored camera descent, decode reveals, opt-in audio
Shared dynamic OG image generator — satori/ImageResponse with committed IBM Plex Mono fonts
/writeups index — engineering blog rendered from a typed structured-content pipeline (no markdown dep)
Writeups content pipeline — typed block arrays, XSS-safe inline rendering, reading-time calc
Typed project loader — mirrors resume.json, feeds /work cards and the corpus
Hand-authored Construct camera stations loader — per-station gaps/easing with a uniform-grid fallback
Oracle client types + SSE frame protocol shared by the chat and JD analyzer
The design-token palette — every colour on the site comes from these CSS variables (tokens-only rule)
FastAPI app assembly — routes, middleware, boot independence (serves with postgres/anthropic down)
The Oracle agent loop — system prompt, tool use, citation assembly, SSE streaming, prompt-injection posture
Allowlisted read-only agent tools — live Prometheus metrics, uptime, deploys, corpus search
pgvector cosine retrieval over the knowledge base
Corpus loaders/chunkers — the privacy boundary; explicit allow-lists, phone/private never enter
Local ONNX embeddings (fastembed bge-small) baked into the image — vectors never leave the box
In-process rate limiting for the public AI endpoints
The ai service Deployment/Service — non-root, resource-capped, secret-mounted
Postgres + pgvector StatefulSet backing the knowledge base
Caddy reverse proxy — routes gipc.dev, applies the strict same-origin CSP and security headers
